laws.title: Consistency in Design Elements
laws.description: There are inconsistencies in button sizes and color shades across different pages.
laws.remediation: Use consistent design tokens for buttons and colors across the site.

laws.title: Visual Clutter on Video Pages
laws.description: Video pages have numerous distracting elements that can overwhelm the user.
laws.remediation: Reduce the number of non-essential elements on video pages to enhance focus on the main content.

laws.title: Alignment Issues
laws.description: Some page elements are not properly aligned, causing visual imbalance.
laws.remediation: Ensure that grid systems are consistently followed for proper alignment.

laws.title: Responsive Design Shortcomings
laws.description: Certain interactive elements are not fully responsive on smaller screens.
laws.remediation: Utilize media queries to ensure all elements adapt seamlessly to screen size changes.

laws.title: Inadequate Typography Hierarchy
laws.description: Lack of clear typographic hierarchy affects readability.
laws.remediation: Implement consistent text styles to distinguish different information levels effectively.
